'''gathava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixode|ixode]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixode|ixode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gathava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæthævæth|gæthævæth]] || [[word:gæthævæj|gæthævæj]] || [[word:gæthævæsh|gæthævæsh]] || [[word:gæthævæ|gæthævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathathavath|gathathavath]] || [[word:gathathavaj|gathathavaj]] || [[word:gathathavash|gathathavash]] || [[word:gathathava|gathathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathavath|gathavath]] || [[word:gathavaj|gathavaj]] || [[word:gathavash|gathavash]] || [[word:gathava|gathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathafvath|gathafvath]] || [[word:gathafvaj|gathafvaj]] || [[word:gathafvash|gathafvash]] || [[word:gathafvaf|gathafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gathavatha|gathavatha]] || [[word:gathavaja|gathavaja]] || [[word:gathavasha|gathavasha]] || [[word:gathavaka|gathavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gathavath|gathavath]] || [[word:gathavaj|gathavaj]] || [[word:gathavash|gathavash]] || [[word:gathava|gathava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gathavathal|gathavathal]] || [[word:gathavajal|gathavajal]] || [[word:gathavashal|gathavashal]] || [[word:gathavakal|gathavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gathavathatha|gathavathatha]] || [[word:gathavajaja|gathavajaja]] || [[word:gathavashasha|gathavashasha]] || [[word:gathavaka|gathavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gathavathan|gathavathan]] || [[word:gathavajan|gathavajan]] || [[word:gathavashan|gathavashan]] || [[word:gathavakan|gathavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gathavathaoro|gathavathaoro]] || [[word:gathavajaoro|gathavajaoro]] || [[word:gathavashaoro|gathavashaoro]] || [[word:gathavakaoro|gathavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
